product_overview: CinePurr is a social synchronized video-watching platform with real-time chat, voting queue, room discovery and rich gamification (XP, streaks, quests, leaderboards) to drive engagement. It supports public/private rooms, host/co-host controls, groups, notifications and a pixel-art UI.
core_goals: Provide low-latency synchronized watch rooms (YouTube, MP4, HLS, IPTV) with host/co‑host controls and robust drift correction
Enable social discovery and sustained engagement through room discovery, groups, notifications, activity feed and real-time chat
Drive retention with gamification: daily streaks, XP, quests, challenges and leaderboards
Offer secure, scalable auth and presence with input sanitisation, rate limiting and socket identity checks
Expose backend APIs to support clients for room management, queue voting, scheduling, groups and user engagement features

features.name: User Login
features.description: Authenticate users with email/username and password to obtain a session token used for protected actions (streaks, profile, socket connections).
user_flows: POST /api/auth/callback/credentials with valid email/username and password -> Receive 200 with session cookie and JWT token -> GET /api/user/streak with token -> Receive 200 with currentStreak and lastLoginDate -> GET /api/profile/{username} with token -> Receive 200 with user profile
POST /api/auth/callback/credentials with invalid credentials -> Receive 401 with error message (invalid_credentials) -> GET /api/profile/{username} without token -> Receive 401 unauthorized

features.name: User Registration
features.description: Create a new account using email, username and password. Optionally auto-login after registration.
user_flows: POST /api/register with username, email and password -> Receive 201 with new userId -> POST /api/auth/callback/credentials with same credentials -> Receive 200 with session cookie and JWT token

POST /api/register with an email or username already in use -> Receive 409 conflict with message (email_already_exists or username_taken) -> POST /api/register with missing required fields -> Receive 400 validation error

features.name: Join Watch Room & Playback Sync
features.description: Discover and join a room, synchronize playback with host-authority model, receive chat history and live chat events via Socket.io.
user_flows: GET /api/rooms/recommendations -> Receive 200 with list of rooms including roomId -> Socket.io connect to /socket with token and roomId -> Receive 'room:state' containing currentVideo, hostId and timestamp -> Socket emit 'room:join' (socket event) -> Receive 'room:joined' and 'chat:history' (last 50 messages) -> Socket emit 'player:sync_request' -> Receive 'player:sync' with authoritative timestamp and playback state

Socket.io connect to /socket without or with invalid token -> Receive 'error:unauthorized' (socket disconnect) -> Attempt GET /api/rooms/recommendations without token -> Receive 200 (public rooms visible) but socket actions that require token return 401

features.name: Video Queue Voting
features.description: Suggest videos to the room queue and vote on queue items; votes reorder the queue and the host can play top items.
user_flows: POST /api/rooms/vote with token and body {roomId, videoId, vote:1} -> Receive 200 with updated voteCount and voter list -> GET /api/rooms/recommendations (or room queue endpoint) with roomId -> Receive 200 showing queue sorted by votes
POST /api/rooms/vote without token (or with expired token) -> Receive 401 unauthorized -> POST /api/rooms/vote with malformed body (missing videoId) -> Receive 400 validation error

features.name: Room Discovery & Recommendations
features.description: Browse trending and recent public rooms and discover friends' rooms via a recommendations API used on the homepage.
user_flows: GET /api/rooms/recommendations -> Receive 200 with trendingRooms and recentRooms arrays -> GET /api/rooms/recommendations?page=2 -> Receive 200 with next page of rooms
GET /api/rooms/recommendations with invalid query param (page=not-a-number) -> Receive 400 bad_request with validation error

features.name: Scheduled Watch Parties
features.description: Create and RSVP to scheduled watch parties, with reminders and countdown timers tied to scheduled room records.
user_flows: POST /api/rooms/scheduled with token and body {title, startTime, templateId, isPublic} -> Receive 201 with scheduledRoomId -> GET /api/rooms/scheduled -> Receive 200 list including the created scheduled room
POST /api/rooms/scheduled with startTime in the past -> Receive 422 validation_error (startTime_must_be_future) -> GET /api/rooms/scheduled with invalid token -> Receive 401 unauthorized

features.name: Room Templates
features.description: Create new rooms from predefined templates (Movie Night, Study Session, Party, etc.) to simplify configuration.
user_flows: POST /api/rooms with token and body {templateId, name, isPublic} -> Receive 201 with roomId and applied templateId -> GET /api/rooms/recommendations -> Receive 200 list showing new room in recent rooms
POST /api/rooms with missing templateId -> Receive 400 validation error -> POST /api/rooms with token lacking permissions (e.g., banned user) -> Receive 403 forbidden

features.name: Groups / Communities
features.description: Create and join named groups with roles; groups can own rooms and enforce member roles (MEMBER, MODERATOR, ADMIN).
user_flows: POST /api/groups with token and body {name, description, icon} -> Receive 201 with groupId -> POST /api/groups/{groupId}/join with token -> Receive 200 membership accepted and GroupMember record
POST /api/groups with duplicate name -> Receive 409 conflict (group_name_taken) -> POST /api/groups/{groupId}/join when membership requires approval (private group) -> Receive 202 pending_approval

features.name: Notification Center
features.description: Fetch in-app notifications, show unread count and mark notifications as read or clear them.
user_flows: GET /api/notifications with token -> Receive 200 with notifications list and unreadCount -> POST /api/notifications/mark-read with token and body {ids:[...]} -> Receive 200 success and updated unreadCount
GET /api/notifications without token -> Receive 401 unauthorized -> POST /api/notifications/mark-read with invalid ids -> Receive 400 validation error

features.name: Activity Feed / Tracking
features.description: Retrieve recent friend and global activities (room joins, creations, badge earns) for the homepage feed.
user_flows: GET /api/activity?limit=50 with token -> Receive 200 with activity items (room_join, room_create, badge_earn) -> GET /api/activity?since={timestamp} with token -> Receive 200 with incremental activity entries
GET /api/activity with malformed since param -> Receive 400 bad_request -> GET /api/activity for private user without permission -> Receive 403 forbidden

features.name: XP, Levels & Daily Streaks
features.description: Track and modify user XP and streaks; actions like joining rooms or sending messages grant XP and affect levels.
user_flows: POST /api/auth/callback/credentials with valid credentials -> Receive 200 with JWT -> GET /api/user/streak with token -> Receive 200 with currentStreak and longestStreak -> POST /api/user/xp with token and body {reason:'join_room', amount:10} -> Receive 200 with updated totalXP and level

POST /api/user/xp without token -> Receive 401 unauthorized -> GET /api/user/streak when user has already claimed today's streak (if applicable) -> Receive 200 with unchanged currentStreak and message indicating already_counted

features.name: Daily Quests & Watch Challenges
features.description: Fetch daily quests, track progress and claim XP rewards; monthly challenges are available via the challenges API.
user_flows: GET /api/quests/daily with token -> Receive 200 with 4 daily quests and progress -> POST /api/quests/daily/complete with token and body {questId} -> Receive 200 with XP reward applied and updated quest status
POST /api/quests/daily/complete for an already completed quest -> Receive 409 conflict (quest_already_completed) -> GET /api/challenges with token -> Receive 200 with monthly challenges and progress

features.name: Leaderboards
features.description: Retrieve top users by watch time, XP/level, messages sent, streaks and rooms created.
user_flows: GET /api/leaderboards?type=watch_time&limit=10 -> Receive 200 top 10 users with watchTime and avatars -> GET /api/leaderboards?type=level&limit=10 -> Receive 200 top 10 users by level
GET /api/leaderboards?type=invalid_type -> Receive 400 bad_request with supported types listed

features.name: User Login
features.description: Login with email and password credentials
user_interactions: Fill email or username input field
See error message on invalid credentials

features.name: Watch Room
features.description: Join a synchronized video room with chat
